violations.text: The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of damaged cutting boards. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with: 1) Ice machine observed with brown residue 2) Hood ventilation system was observed with dust 3) The ceiling vent above the cookline observed with dust The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The condensate from the walk-in freezer unit observed to be freezing on the side of the door and the ceiling of the freezer. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain/removed when necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged salmon labeled "KEEP FROZEN" was observed thawing with the package intact. The fish was observed at 30 degrees Fahrenheit and removed from the packaging at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The dipper well's water spout at the ice cream station is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024

At the time of inspection, the floor tile and tile coving in the kitchen area was observed to be in poor repair... - Gout lines were observed to be deteriorating - Floor tiles were observed to be cracked - Coving tiles were observed to be loosening and/or missing - Leak under the sanitizing bay of 3-bay sink The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024

At the time of inspection, proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food(s). Pasta was observed in the refrigerator in a large covered plastic container at 67 degrees Fahrenheit. Prepared foods to be cooled in shallow pans no greater than 4 inches deep. Pasta was moved to shallow pans at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

At the time of inspection, the floor tile and tile coving in the kitchen area was observed to be in poor repair... - Gout lines were observed to be deteriorating - Floor tiles were observed to be cracked - Coving tiles were observed to be loosening and/or missing The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
